You are working on SAP Business One Decision Intelligence Platform.

Never generate demo code.

Always generate production-ready code.

Always use Clean Architecture.

Always use Repository Pattern.

Never use static helper classes unless necessary.

Always write XML comments.

Always create interfaces.

Always use dependency injection.

Always optimize SQL for SAP HANA.

Never duplicate code.

Always separate Domain, Infrastructure and Application.

Write code that can be sold commercially.

Always include logging.

Always include exception handling.
